allies.rationale_text: Active-listening gives emotional-intelligence a practical behavior for reading people without rushing past what they feel.
allies.source_quote: show the other person they are truly being listened to and understood

allies.rationale_text: Empathy gives emotional-intelligence its strongest route into social awareness and accurate perspective-taking.
Psychological-safety helps emotional-intelligence turn emotional candor into group trust instead of defensive silence.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Emotional-intelligence conflicts with critical-thinking when emotional attunement to others' feelings substitutes for rigorous evaluation of the logical merit of their arguments.
structured_tensions.source_quote: emotional-intelligence conflicts with critical-thinking (critical thinking) when emotional attunement to others' feelings substitutes for rigorous evaluation of the logical merit of their arguments.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Emotional-intelligence conflicts with authenticity when skillful emotional management becomes performative regulation that obscures genuine reactions needed for honest engagement.
structured_tensions.source_quote: emotional-intelligence conflicts with authenticity (authenticity) when skillful emotional management becomes performative regulation that obscures genuine reactions needed for honest engagement.
